description.value:
Source: Ariadne's Book of Legends - Alpha v1.2, p. 58-61.

Level 23

Killing Strikes

Starting at 23rd level, your hunting skills and your magic have made you deadlier than any other at dispatching your foes. Your critical range is increased by 1. When you hit critically, you deal Lethal damage instead of your normal damage type. In addition, when you hit a creature with an attack and that creature has 50 or fewer hit points remaining, you can choose to reduce it to 0 hit points.

Wisdom of the Wild

At 23rd level, increase your Wisdom score by 2, up to a maximum of 24.

Unseen Tracker

Also at 23rd level, the nature spirits that accompany you become even better at hiding your trace. You are always under the effects of the nondetection spell and truesight cannot reveal you if you are invisible.

source.custom: Original en-US text from Alpha v1.2
